section_name: Application for Dealer General Distinguishing Number

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: An applicant for an original or renewal dealer general distinguishing number must submit to the department a written application on a form that:
contains the information required by the department;
contains information that demonstrates the person meets the requirements prescribed by Section 503.032 (Established and Permanent Place of Business) ;
contains information that demonstrates the applicant has complied with all applicable state laws and municipal ordinances;
states that the applicant agrees to allow the department to examine during working hours the ownership papers for each registered or unregistered vehicle in the applicant’s possession or control; and
specifies whether the applicant proposes to be a:

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135, Sec. 140(2), eff. September 1, 2013.
submitted before the date the general distinguishing number expires; and
accompanied by the appropriate fee prescribed by Section 503.007 (Fees for General Distinguishing Number) .

history.raw: Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 140(2), eff. September 1, 2013.
